description: Sanitized JSON group-key consistency rule samples. Each case pairs a rule (type + key) with a small record set; the engine must classify the case as pass/fail/reject. Migrated from the legacy Reader-Core group_consistency suite (6 files); 3 representative cases retained (pass / duplicate-hit / invalid-rule-reject).

rule_schema.description: Asserts that the value of `key` is unique across all records in the group.
rule_schema.pass_when: all record values for `key` are distinct
rule_schema.fail_when: a duplicate value for `key` is detected
rule_schema.reject_when: rule.type is not a recognized rule name
